ignisNote: Re-baselining the audit score from 91→82 by applying stricter criteria revealed Code Quality gap (72/100) as the stealthiest drag on the project. Portal.js at 4,465 lines will compound — module splitting should be prioritized before it becomes unmaintainable. Dev Health ceiling is currently 9/10 max until E2E tests and portal split are done.
